class.name: Snapshot
class.brief_description: A resource that holds the state of a saved game.
class.description: Snapshot is a Resource designed to contain the serialized state of the game, managed by the SaveServer.

members.member: A SHA-256 checksum used to verify the integrity of the snapshot data.
Optional dictionary containing game-specific metadata (e.g. playtime, level name) for quick preview without loading the full snapshot.
The main dictionary containing the serialized state of the objects and their properties.
Internal map that links specific gameplay tags to satellite save files for modular persistence.
An optional [Texture2D] resource representing a visual preview of the save state.
The version of the application ([code]application/config/version[/code]) at the time the snapshot was created, used for migrations.
